summary: Section charters have no covers-graph coverage. All 6 section charters (S1-S6) are coverage-required per file_schemas.md but zero assertions point covers at any '.../sections/<i>/charter'.
context: Section acceptance prose IS covered (all 6 sections have multiple acceptance_assertions). But charter — the prior load-bearing claim of WHAT each section must do — is not. In practice the charter content is largely re-expressed in the acceptance text and verified through it; the gap is in the explicit covers-graph link, not in behavioral verification.
recommendation: Defer to Arbiter for a v1.7 Principle-C strict-pass decision: either (a) add covers pointers to the existing acceptance_assertions so each one also covers the corresponding charter, (b) introduce new charter-specific assertions, or (c) accept the gap on the basis that charter coverage is fully entailed by acceptance coverage and the build is correct.
